# API Contract: Roster Management

**Base URL**: `https://api.roster.{domain}`
**Protocol**: HTTPS / REST / JSON
**OpenAPI spec**: auto-generated by Swashbuckle at `/swagger/v1/swagger.json` (also
exported as a static artefact by CI to `openapi.json` at the repo root for orval)

---

## Authentication

All endpoints except `POST /teams` and `GET /health` require the team access secret
in the request header:

```
X-Team-Secret: <plaintext secret issued at team creation>
```

The `TeamAccessMiddleware` hashes the header value (SHA-256) and looks up the
corresponding team in the in-memory store. If no match is found, the request is
rejected with `401 Unauthorized`. The resolved `TeamId` is injected into the request
context for downstream use.

`POST /teams` is unauthenticated (it creates a new team and issues the secret).
`GET /health` is unauthenticated (used by ECS ALB health checks).

---

## Health

### `GET /health`

Returns the readiness state of the API instance.

**Response `200 OK`** (healthy — aggregate replay complete):
```json
{ "status": "Healthy" }
```

**Response `503 Service Unavailable`** (replay in progress):
```json
{ "status": "Unhealthy", "reason": "Aggregate replay in progress" }
```

---

## Teams

### `POST /teams` — Create a team

Creates a new team and returns the one-time plaintext access secret.

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "name": "Thunderbolts",
  "sportName": "Softball"
}
```

| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | Required; 1–100 chars |
| `sportName` | string | Required; must match a configured sport (e.g., "Softball") |

**Response `201 Created`**:
```json
{
  "teamId": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "name": "Thunderbolts",
  "sportName": "Softball",
  "accessSecret": "kZ3mQ9vXwY2pL7..."
}
```

> **Important**: `accessSecret` is returned exactly once. The coach must save it.
> It is never retrievable again (only its hash is stored in the event log).

**Response `400 Bad Request`**: Invalid sport name or missing fields.

---

### `GET /teams/{teamId}` — Get team details

Returns team metadata. Requires `X-Team-Secret` header.

**Response `200 OK`**:
```json
{
  "teamId": "...",
  "name": "Thunderbolts",
  "sportName": "Softball",
  "sport": {
    "name": "Softball",
    "skills": ["Hitting", "Catching", "Throwing"],
    "positions": [
      "Pitcher", "Catcher",
      "1st Base", "2nd Base", "3rd Base", "Shortstop",
      "Left Field", "Left-Centre Field", "Right-Centre Field", "Right Field"
    ]
  }
}
```

**Response `401`**: Invalid secret. **Response `404`**: Team not found.

---

## Players

All player endpoints require `X-Team-Secret` header.

### `GET /teams/{teamId}/players` — List roster

**Response `200 OK`**:
```json
[
  {
    "playerId": "...",
    "name": "Jane Smith",
    "isActive": true,
    "skills": {
      "Hitting": 4,
      "Catching": 3,
      "Throwing": 5
    }
  }
]
```

---

### `POST /teams/{teamId}/players` — Add a player

**Request body**:
```json
{ "name": "Jane Smith" }
```

| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | Required; 1–100 chars |

**Response `201 Created`**:
```json
{
  "playerId": "...",
  "name": "Jane Smith",
  "isActive": true,
  "skills": {}
}
```

**Response `400`**: Name empty or too long.

---

### `PUT /teams/{teamId}/players/{playerId}/skills/{skillName}` — Rate a skill

Sets or updates one skill rating for a player.

**Request body**:
```json
{ "rating": 4 }
```

| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `rating` | int | Required; 1–5 inclusive |
| `skillName` (path) | string | Must be a valid skill for the team's sport |

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `400`**: Rating out of range or skill name invalid.
**Response `404`**: Player not found or inactive.

---

### `DELETE /teams/{teamId}/players/{playerId}` — Deactivate a player

Marks the player as inactive. Historical game data is preserved.

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `404`**: Player not found.
**Response `409 Conflict`**: Player already inactive.

---

## Games

All game endpoints require `X-Team-Secret` header.

### `GET /teams/{teamId}/games` — List games

**Response `200 OK`**:
```json
[
  {
    "gameId": "...",
    "date": "2026-04-12",
    "opponent": "Tigers",
    "inningCount": 6,
    "isLocked": false,
    "absentPlayerIds": []
  }
]
```

---

### `POST /teams/{teamId}/games` — Create a game

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "date": "2026-04-12",
  "opponent": "Tigers",
  "inningCount": 6
}
```

| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `date` | string | Required; ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `opponent` | string? | Optional; max 100 chars |
| `inningCount` | int | Required; 1–12; defaults to 6 if omitted |

**Response `201 Created`**:
```json
{
  "gameId": "...",
  "date": "2026-04-12",
  "opponent": "Tigers",
  "inningCount": 6,
  "isLocked": false,
  "absentPlayerIds": [],
  "battingOrder": [],
  "inningAssignments": {}
}
```

---

### `GET /teams/{teamId}/games/{gameId}` — Get a game

**Response `200 OK`**:
```json
{
  "gameId": "...",
  "date": "2026-04-12",
  "opponent": "Tigers",
  "inningCount": 6,
  "isLocked": false,
  "absentPlayerIds": ["player-id-1"],
  "battingOrder": ["player-id-2", "player-id-3"],
  "inningAssignments": {
    "1": [
      { "playerId": "player-id-2", "position": "Pitcher" },
      { "playerId": "player-id-3", "position": "Catcher" }
    ]
  }
}
```

**Response `404`**: Game not found.

---

### `POST /teams/{teamId}/games/{gameId}/absent` — Mark player absent

**Request body**:
```json
{ "playerId": "..." }
```

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `400`**: Player not on team.
**Response `409`**: Game is locked. **Response `409`**: Player already marked absent.

---

### `DELETE /teams/{teamId}/games/{gameId}/absent/{playerId}` — Revoke absence

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `404`**: Player not marked absent for this game.
**Response `409`**: Game is locked.

---

### `PUT /teams/{teamId}/games/{gameId}/batting-order` — Set batting order

Replaces the full batting order for the game. Emits `BattingOrderSet` only when valid.

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "orderedPlayerIds": [
    "player-id-1",
    "player-id-2",
    "player-id-3"
  ]
}
```

| Rule | Detail |
|---|---|
| All IDs must be active, non-absent players on this team | |
| No duplicate player IDs | |
| At least 1 player | |

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `400`**: Duplicate IDs, inactive player, or absent player included.
**Response `409`**: Game is locked.

---

### `PUT /teams/{teamId}/games/{gameId}/innings/{inningNumber}/fielding` — Assign inning

Replaces all fielding assignments for one inning. Emits `InningFieldingAssigned` only
when the full assignment is valid.

**Path parameter**: `inningNumber` — 1-based integer; must be ≤ game's `inningCount`.

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "assignments": [
    { "playerId": "player-id-1", "position": "Pitcher" },
    { "playerId": "player-id-2", "position": "Catcher" },
    { "playerId": "player-id-3", "position": "Bench" }
  ]
}
```

| Rule | Detail |
|---|---|
| Each active, non-absent player MUST appear exactly once | |
| No two players may share the same non-Bench position | Bench may appear multiple times |
| `position` must be a valid sport position name or `"Bench"` | |

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `400`**: Position conflict, invalid position name, missing player, or
  inactive/absent player included.
**Response `409`**: Game is locked.

---

### `POST /teams/{teamId}/games/{gameId}/lock` — Lock game

Permanently marks the game as final. Cannot be undone.

**Response `204 No Content`**

**Response `409`**: Game is already locked.

---

## Balance

All balance endpoints require `X-Team-Secret` header.

### `GET /teams/{teamId}/balance` — Get position balance matrix

Returns the cumulative inning-count per player per position across all games in the team.

**Response `200 OK`**:
```json
{
  "positions": [
    "Pitcher", "Catcher", "1st Base", "2nd Base", "3rd Base", "Shortstop",
    "Left Field", "Left-Centre Field", "Right-Centre Field", "Right Field", "Bench"
  ],
  "rows": [
    {
      "playerId": "...",
      "playerName": "Jane Smith",
      "isActive": true,
      "counts": {
        "Pitcher": 3,
        "Catcher": 6,
        "1st Base": 0,
        "2nd Base": 2,
        "3rd Base": 1,
        "Shortstop": 4,
        "Left Field": 2,
        "Left-Centre Field": 0,
        "Right-Centre Field": 1,
        "Right Field": 2,
        "Bench": 3
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

`counts` includes all positions with a count of 0 for positions the player has not yet
been assigned, so the UI can render a consistent matrix without null checks.

---

## Error Response Format

All error responses use a consistent envelope:

```json
{
  "type": "https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1",
  "title": "Bad Request",
  "status": 400,
  "detail": "Position conflict: 'Pitcher' is already assigned to player Jane Smith in inning 3.",
  "traceId": "00-abc123..."
}
```

This is the standard ASP.NET Core `ProblemDetails` format (RFC 7807).
